text.message: you guys seeing this personal info thing?
weird theres a banner over the top of my game
i opted out and it went away
if colonist takes me down, so be it
oj will you trade wood for wheat 1st turn?
im sorry black this is just too good for my game
i thought you said will they trade wheat
I’m on my phone so I gotta pull up chat in order to see
So give me a lil more time lol
Ur close to port blue isn’t that was my reasoning
black has rolled 3 straight 7s and soloed me :(
i mean youd have two cities by now if he hadnt
is my position that strong? I produce no sheep or wood
there was no reason to do what you did
i still think you have a great game black w port
Red might be the solo king
lets not give oj a city
that might be gg for oj
Red got road on lock and black has army on lock
If I win it has to be straight production
i have to fight u for road
Twin there’s no road network for me
oj we at least have to slow you down
Red flying under the radar jus watch him is all I can ask
for sure, really think its anyone's game
Blue is also really scary bru😭
Red is also on wood port
Think it’s time to move that robber
oj can road settle for the road
ya bc youre making us army players take road
red you need to lock it this turn
youre getting too greedy w these pops
me? first pop all game lol
yes but you havent done anything to take road last few orbits
what am i supposed to do
black i can trade you brick
you just traded red the road
how could i possible have win in hand?
black how might brick did u have
